title: Digital & multi-currency — compare product scope
intro: App-first and multi-currency tools differ by licence and account type. Read Dutch disclosures for the exact product before using one account for salary or rent.

items.reason: Dutch-licensed digital bank — compare subscription tiers and included account types on bunq’s pricing pages.
Multi-currency app — validate plan limits, weekend FX, and whether the product fits your payroll or landlord acceptance.
Mobile euro account — confirm current NL product scope and fees on N26’s official pages.
Multi-currency balances and transfers — compare with a Dutch current account for iDEAL and direct debit needs.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
